text:
Adam Peaty had been on top form in 2016, when he clinched the gold medal for the men's 100 metre breaststroke - but his magnificentOlympic Gameswin was overshadowed this year when he was merely awarded a silver medal.

Despite that, he has had vocal support fromStrictly palsincludingDan Walker, who described their friendship as one of "the best things" about the show. Meanwhile, his girlfriend Holly Ramsay - daughter of notoriously hot-headed Scottish chefGordon Ramsay-posted a picture of the pair kissing as they celebrated the triumph.

Dan Walker's emotional tribute was posted on Twitter today, as the Channel 5 newsreader, who partnered Nadiya Bychkova back in 2021, revealed: "Getting to know @adam_peaty was one of the best things aboutStrictly Come Dancing.

"He has always been an incredible athlete but he’s also a top bloke and that post-silver-medal interview was an emotional watch." He then quoted his epic speech, where the Olympian had revealed: "I’m not crying because I’m second… I’m crying because I knew how much it took to get here."

Dan had earlier revealed to theI Paperthat dancing on Strictly had initially been "one of the worst TV experiences of my life" and that it had at times been "a nightmare".

READ MORE:Strictly's Giovanni Pernice leaves fans 'heartbroken' as he issues announcement



He'd been reluctant from the start, having turned down the opportunity to appear on the show four years running, before finally agreeing on the fifth try.

Although Dan had nothing negative to say about his dance partner, he hadn't always been comfortable due to nerves.

However, it turned out that meeting Adam was one of the highlights of the show for the formerBBCsports reporter, who is known for his passion for the sporting world.

Katya Jones - who previously partnered Adam on the show - also had something to say about her pal's success,even turning up in person to watch him receive his accolade.

Don't miss:Adam Peaty's Strictly partner issues three-word verdict as he sobs over Olympics

Don't miss:Holly Ramsay issues emotional Adam Peaty statement after Olympics agony

Don't miss:BBC Olympics host Balding calls out England Euro 2024 stars in Peaty comparison



She made it clear that, even if he hadn't managed a gold medal, his achievement was still a win in her eyes, declaring triumphantly: "He did it!"

Posting live from La Defense Arena in Paris, she told her 239,000Instagramfollowers: "I have so much respect for this guy. Such a wholesome human, which shows in and out of the pool.

"As he said, in his heart he has won. And he will always be our champion. Well done @melmarshallmassive, we know it won’t be possible without you. It felt very personal last night to be there and watch him swim. And so special to be part of the support gang for Adam!"

In the comments, one fan reasoned: "He did exceptionally well given the fact that not so long ago he wondered if the sport was for him any more. As he said he may not be the youngest out there but he showed he can compete with anyone. What a performance!"

Meanwhile, girlfriend Holly Ramsay, whose sister Tilly partnered him on Strictly in 2021, when she became the show's youngest contestant ever at 19 years old, also praised him for his Olympics feat.

title: Adam Peaty helped Strictly star who called show 'worst TV experience of life' | Celebrity News | Showbiz & TV | Express.co.uk
author: Chloe Govan
description: Dan Walker and Katya Jones are among the celebrities who have congratulated Adam Peaty after his Olympics results reduced him to tears.
